parameters.query:
SELECT a.appointment_id,
       to_char(a.appointment_date, 'DD Mon YYYY') AS appointment_date,
       to_char(a.appointment_time, 'HH12:MI AM') AS appointment_time,
       t.name  AS tenant_name,
       t.email AS tenant_email,
       o.name  AS owner_name,
       o.email AS owner_email,
       p.location      AS property_location,
       p.property_type AS property_type
FROM public.appointment a
JOIN public.tenant         t ON t.tenant_id = a.tenant_id
JOIN public.property_owner o ON o.owner_id  = a.owner_id
JOIN public.property       p ON p.property_id = a.property_id
WHERE a.status = 'approved'
  AND a.reminder_sent_at IS NULL
  AND a.appointment_date BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE AND CURRENT_DATE + 1;

parameters.name: subject
parameters.value: Reminder: Your PropertyPal viewing is coming up

parameters.name: html
parameters.value:
=

Viewing Reminder

Hi {{ $('Get Due Appointments').item.json.tenant_name }},

This is a friendly reminder about your upcoming property viewing.

Property: {{ $('Get Due Appointments').item.json.property_type }} at {{ $('Get Due Appointments').item.json.property_location }}

Date: {{ $('Get Due Appointments').item.json.appointment_date }}

Time: {{ $('Get Due Appointments').item.json.appointment_time }}

Owner: {{ $('Get Due Appointments').item.json.owner_name }}

Please arrive on time. If you need to cancel or reschedule, do so from your PropertyPal dashboard.

This is an automated reminder from PropertyPal.

parameters.name: subject
parameters.value: Reminder: An upcoming viewing for your property

parameters.name: html
parameters.value:
=

Upcoming Viewing Reminder

Hi {{ $('Get Due Appointments').item.json.owner_name }},

A tenant has an approved viewing for your property coming up.

Property: {{ $('Get Due Appointments').item.json.property_type }} at {{ $('Get Due Appointments').item.json.property_location }}

Tenant: {{ $('Get Due Appointments').item.json.tenant_name }}

Date: {{ $('Get Due Appointments').item.json.appointment_date }}

Time: {{ $('Get Due Appointments').item.json.appointment_time }}

Please be available to host the viewing. You can manage appointments from your PropertyPal dashboard.

This is an automated reminder from PropertyPal.

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO public.notifications (type, recipient_type, recipient_email, subject, status)
VALUES
  ('appointment_reminder', 'tenant', '{{ $('Get Due Appointments').item.json.tenant_email }}', 'Reminder: Your PropertyPal viewing is coming up', 'sent'),
  ('appointment_reminder', 'owner',  '{{ $('Get Due Appointments').item.json.owner_email }}',  'Reminder: An upcoming viewing for your property', 'sent');
